flora.scene_idea: A premium editorial travel insurance campaign film for Xalq Sigorta. Inside a modern intercity train on the Baku-Tbilisi route, one relaxed Azerbaijani couple in their early 30s sits by the window, not looking at camera, quietly watching a Caucasus railway viaduct and hazy mountains outside. Soft late-morning window light from camera right, 50mm documentary feel, subtle film grain. Lower-left foreground has a clean matte red hard-shell suitcase in Xalq Sigorta red. The woman holds a phone with only an abstract red shield and three simple bars on a white screen, no readable text. The man casually holds navy passports with a folded ticket. Keep the mood cinematic, trustworthy, premium, calm, and non-stock-photo. Leave clean negative space in the upper-left for headline overlay and a clean footer zone.

api_notes: GET /techniques/{technique_id}/runs/{run_id} returned Technique run not found.
The API-origin project exists, but its canvas is not initialized until opened in Flora editor.

codex_fallback.seedance_prompt: Create a premium cinematic travel insurance film set inside a modern intercity train on the Baku-Tbilisi route. Frame one Azerbaijani couple in their early 30s seated by a large train window, relaxed and quietly content, never looking at camera. They watch a hazy Caucasus railway viaduct and distant mountains passing outside. Use a 50mm documentary lens feel, soft late-morning window light from camera right, gentle shadows, natural skin texture, subtle organic film grain, and a restrained editorial tone rather than lifestyle stock. In the lower-left foreground, show a matte red hard-shell suitcase in Xalq Sigorta red, partially cropped. The woman holds a smartphone angled slightly toward camera; the screen contains only an abstract red shield silhouette and three simple horizontal data bars on white, with no readable text or logos. The man casually holds navy passports with a folded paper ticket. Keep the mood calm, trustworthy, premium, and travel-ready. Preserve clean negative space in the upper-left for a future headline overlay and a clean footer zone at the bottom. Avoid readable text, signage, fake logos, extra people, over-saturated colors, heavy red wash, sci-fi glow, plastic skin, or distorted hands.

verification.result: Background removal succeeded; output PNG has transparent background.
